text: A regional logistics company with 500 trucks implemented ML-based route optimization using historical GPS and delivery data. Reduced fuel costs by 14% and improved on-time delivery from 87% to 94% within 4 months.

An e-commerce fulfillment provider deployed demand forecasting models using 3 years of order history. Reduced warehouse overstaffing costs by 25% and eliminated 90% of stockout events during peak seasons.
A manufacturing company with 12 production lines implemented computer vision for defect detection. Reduced quality inspection time by 60% and caught 30% more defects than manual inspection.
A financial services firm built an ML fraud detection system processing 2M daily transactions. Reduced false positive rate by 40% compared to rules-based system while catching 15% more actual fraud.

A healthcare SaaS company deployed NLP-based patient triage for urgent care clinics. Reduced average wait times by 35% and improved triage accuracy to 92%, freeing nursing staff for higher-acuity patients.

A B2B SaaS company serving supply chain managers implemented carrier performance scoring using 18 months of shipment data. Automated carrier selection reduced shipping costs by 12% across 150K annual shipments.

An insurance company built predictive models for claims processing using historical claims and adjuster notes. Reduced average claims processing time from 14 days to 5 days and improved accuracy of initial reserve estimates by 25%.
A mid-market retailer deployed customer churn prediction using purchase history and engagement data. Targeted retention campaigns reduced churn by 18% and increased customer lifetime value by 22%.
A construction company implemented predictive maintenance for heavy equipment using IoT sensor data. Reduced unplanned downtime by 28% and extended average equipment lifespan by 15%.
A professional services firm deployed an AI-powered document analysis system for contract review. Reduced contract review time by 70% and identified 40% more risk clauses than manual review.
